name: Butterball Roasting Broiler Easy Easter Supper
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 425°F.
2. Rinse the chicken thoroughly.
3. Mix minced garlic, lemon juice, rosemary, salt, and pepper.
4. Rub the mixture under the skin of the breast and thigh area.
5. Tie the legs with string.
6. Rub the outside of the skin with a mixture of lemon peel and oil, sprinkling generously with paprika.
7. Place the chicken breast side up in a lightly greased large roasting pan and add potatoes.
8. Bake until the chicken is cooked through and juices run clear, about 20-25 minutes per pound (or until internal meat temperature reaches 165°F), brushing occasionally with pan juices.
9. Let stand for 10 minutes before serving.
